headline: Solana Funds Reject $100M Forward Industries Merger Bid

article.title: Solana treasury firms resist Forward Industries’ consolidation push
article.summary: Two Solana treasury firms rejected acquisition proposals from Forward Industries, while a third offer expired without a response.

article.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
article.summary: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.

headline: US Oil Reserves Fall to 43-Year Low

article.title: US Oil Reserve Hits 43-Year Low as Trump Aims to Tame Prices
article.summary: The US’s emergency supply of crude oil has fallen to its lowest level since 1983 as the Trump administration moves toward completing its plan to release 172 million barrels to ease surging fuel prices spurred by the war in Iran.

headline: US Inflation Slows 2% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: Worst of US Inflation May Be Over If Iran Peace Deal Sticks
article.summary: The peace agreement between the US and Iran, if it holds, suggests the worst of the war-driven inflation has likely passed, but the outlook for American consumers and the broader economy remains far from certain.

headline: Bitcoin Surges 10% on $100M Buy Amid Fed Week

article.title: Bitcoin Price and Crypto Stocks Surge as Iran Ceasefire, Strategy’s $100M Buy Collide With Fed Week
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price and Crypto Stocks Surge as Iran Ceasefire, Strategy’s $100M Buy Collide With Fed Week
Bitcoin price surged to a two-week high near $67,000 as an Iran ceasefire eased macro fears and Strategy’s $100 million Bitcoin purchase fueled crypto-stock gains.

headline: $11M Crypto Scam: Seoul Charges 23 in Laundering Probe

article.title: South Korea Charges 23 Over Crypto Laundering Tied to $11M Cambodian Scam Ring
article.summary: South Korea has arrested dozens accused of moving $11.1 million in crypto for a Cambodia-based phishing group.

article.title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
article.summary: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

headline: BlackRock Debuts Bitcoin Income ETF with 5% Yield

article.title: BlackRock launches new Bitcoin ETF that generates income using a covered call strategy
article.summary: BITA holds bitcoin and BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF (IBIT) and generates income by selling call options on up to 35% of those IBIT holdings.

headline: Coinbase Enables $402 Payments for AI Agents

article.title: Coinbase, AWS enable publishers on CloudFront and WAF to charge AI agents via x402 protocol
article.summary: Coinbase and AWS are allowing publishers on CloudFront and WAF to charge AI agents for content via the x402 protocol.

headline: SpaceX Surges Past Amazon in $1 Trillion Valuation

article.title: SpaceX set to leapfrog Amazon to become world’s fifth-largest company
article.summary: Elon Musk’s rocket company extends blistering post-IPO rally and announces $60bn acquisition

headline: OpenAI Burns $34bn Ahead of Planned IPO Filing

article.title: OpenAI spending hit $34bn last year ahead of planned IPO
article.summary: Audited figures reveal mounting costs from model development, infrastructure and rapid expansion
